name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-12
title: tdd-step.py auto_close_backlog references deleted backlog-item-status.py
description: auto_close_backlog targets backlog-item-status.py which no longer exists (unified into item-status.py). isfile check returns False so function is dead code. Spec invariant 4 still claims auto-close works.

history.note: Wave 4: auto_close uses item-status.py; state machine accepts test-green → spec-update for cycle restart.
